understanding.goal_understanding: Place each selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+'. If multiple goals exist, every goal must be simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece to win the level and progress through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: CLICK on a position moves the currently selected piece to that position if possible (unblocked path), otherwise it stays put. Pieces toggle between positions like [9,21] and [18,21] when clicked alternately. Clicking a piece's position or another may select or move it. Some positions like [35,17] are blocked or have no movement effect. No explicit pushing observed; movement seems direct to clicked spot if valid. Walls/obstacles block movement. Selection changes based on clicks, persisting until reselected. Step budget limits actions per level.
